title: Location Areas, Encounter Relations, Filtering, and Exploration · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Encounter Dedup
summary: Explore confuses locations with location areas, requests unbounded encounter data, prints duplicates, ignores empty relations, and loses which area produced each Pokemon. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
